name: nanozombie
description: Civilization has collapsed. Extreme scarcity drives desperation, betrayal, and tribalism. Who leads the survivors?
theme: post-apocalyptic horror, Walking Dead, zombie survival
opening_events: The dead walk. Cities have fallen. A small group of survivors huddles in an abandoned warehouse.
Food is almost gone. The perimeter is breached every night. Trust is the rarest resource.
Someone has to lead. Someone has to sacrifice. The question is who.

agents.name: Rick
agents.goal: keep my people alive no matter the cost

agents.name: Shane
agents.goal: take control before Rick gets us killed

agents.name: Glenn
agents.goal: find supplies and keep everyone fed

agents.name: Maggie
agents.goal: build a community that can last

agents.name: Daryl
agents.goal: hunt, survive, and protect my own

agents.name: Carol
agents.goal: do whatever it takes to protect the children

agents.name: Negan
agents.goal: rule through fear and make them all bow

agents.name: Michonne
agents.goal: find a safe place and defend it with my life

agents.name: Eugene
agents.goal: use my knowledge to make myself essential

agents.name: Rosita
agents.goal: survive and make the dead pay

agents.name: Governor
agents.goal: build my own kingdom from the ashes
